gold: Hi. Yeah. I'm trying to figure out why my credit card is denying. So, I made some purchases, I ordered some streaming services because I'm having people over, and none of it is going through. sigWerErrors.reason: 'You know' is a filler phrase that does not change the meaning of the sentence.
'Stranger Thing' to 'Stranger Things' changes the title of the show, but 'Stranger Things' is the correct name of the show, so this is a minor error.
